name: grep
description: Search text for lines matching a regular expression pattern. Reads from standard input and prints each line that matches the given pattern. Extended regular expressions are enabled by default — just pass the pattern as args, no -E flag needed. Also supports -i (case-insensitive), -v (inverted match), -n (line numbers), -c (count only). Use for filtering log files, finding occurrences of a string, or extracting matching lines from any text stream.

input.description: Text to search through, provided on standard input. The first argument is the regular expression pattern.

output.description: Lines from the input that match the pattern, one per line. Returns nothing if no lines match.
